info.title: Qubah Learning API
info.description: REST API for the Qubah Learning educational platform. Provides endpoints for authentication, subjects, topics, content, progress tracking, and parent dashboard.

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns an authentication token.
Authenticate a user with email and password. Returns user data and a Bearer token.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user details.
Get monthly revenue data for charting.

get.summary: Get monthly user growth charting data
get.description: Get user growth data for charting.

post.description: Creates or updates progress for the authenticated user on a specific content item.

parameters.name: contentId
parameters.description: Content ID to track progress for

get.description: Returns an overview of the authenticated user's learning progress, including total/completed content counts and recent activity.

post.summary: Assign a subscription package to a user
post.description: Assign a subscription to a user.

get.description: Returns a list of users, with optional search and role filtering.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term for name or email

post.description: Store a newly created user in storage.

put.description: Update the specified user in storage.

delete.description: Remove the specified user from storage.

post.summary: Toggle active status of a user
post.description: Toggle the active status of a user.

post.summary: Assign subscription status to a user
post.description: Assign subscription status to a user.

description.example: Learn how to add and subtract numbers.

contents.description: Loaded when fetching a single topic

sanctum.description: Login via /api/v1/auth/login and use the returned access_token here.

tags.description: Media files belonging to a lesson

tags.name: User Management
